violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Detail cleaning needed.
Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not covered or inverted during storage. Invert utensils in container at service window.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not clean. Public restrooms need cleaning.

Storage areas for refuse, recyclables, and returnables. — --The outside storage surface for holding refuse, recyclables and returnables was not constructed of nonabsorbent material and/or sloped to drain. Dumpsters stored on dirt/gravel.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors need detail cleaning under equipment & shelving units. Ceiling needs cleaning around vents.
Food service manager certification. — --Person in charge did not hold an approved food service manager certificate.
Receptacles, covers/lids, adequate number, clean, insect/rodent proof, storage, frequency, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
